initial_candidates.sql:
WITH seller_metrics AS (
    SELECT 
        oi.seller_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT oc.customer_unique_id) AS distinct_customers,
        SUM(oi.price - oi.freight_value) AS total_profit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS distinct_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN oor.review_score = 5 THEN 1 END) AS five_star_count
    FROM olist_orders oo
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON oo.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_customers oc ON oo.customer_id = oc.customer_id
    JOIN olist_order_reviews oor ON oi.order_id = oor.order_id
    WHERE oo.order_status = 'delivered'
    GROUP BY oi.seller_id
),
top_customers AS (
    SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers, 'highest number of distinct customer unique IDs' AS achievement
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY distinct_customers DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_profit AS (
    SELECT seller_id, total_profit, 'highest profit' AS achievement
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY total_profit DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_orders AS (
    SELECT seller_id, distinct_orders, 'highest number of distinct orders' AS achievement
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY distinct_orders DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_ratings AS (
    SELECT seller_id, five_star_count, 'most 5-star ratings' AS achievement
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY five_star_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers AS value, achievement FROM top_customers
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, total_profit AS value, achievement FROM top_profit
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, distinct_orders AS value, achievement FROM top_orders
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, five_star_count AS value, achievement FROM top_ratings;

WITH seller_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    oi.seller_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.customer_unique_id) AS distinct_customers,
    SUM(oi.price - oi.freight_value) AS total_profit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS distinct_orders,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN oir.review_score = 5 THEN 1 END) AS five_star_count
  FROM olist_orders oo
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON oo.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_customers oc ON oo.customer_id = oc.customer_id
  JOIN olist_order_reviews oir ON oi.order_id = oir.order_id
  WHERE oo.order_status = 'delivered'
  GROUP BY oi.seller_id
),
top_customers AS (
  SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers, 'seller with highest number of distinct customer unique IDs' AS description
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY distinct_customers DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_profit AS (
  SELECT seller_id, total_profit, 'seller with highest profit (price - freight value)' AS description
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY total_profit DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_orders AS (
  SELECT seller_id, distinct_orders, 'seller with highest number of distinct orders' AS description
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY distinct_orders DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_reviews AS (
  SELECT seller_id, five_star_count, 'seller with most 5-star ratings' AS description
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY five_star_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers, description FROM top_customers
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, total_profit, description FROM top_profit
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, distinct_orders, description FROM top_orders
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, five_star_count, description FROM top_reviews;

WITH seller_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    oi.seller_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.customer_unique_id) AS distinct_customers,
    SUM(oi.price - oi.freight_value) AS total_profit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS distinct_orders,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN orr.review_score = 5 THEN 1 END) AS five_star_count
  FROM olist_orders oo
  JOIN olist_order_items oi ON oo.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN olist_customers oc ON oo.customer_id = oc.customer_id
  JOIN olist_order_reviews orr ON oi.order_id = orr.order_id
  WHERE oo.order_status = 'delivered'
  GROUP BY oi.seller_id
),
top_customers AS (
  SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers, 'Best in distinct customers' AS achievement
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY distinct_customers DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_profit AS (
  SELECT seller_id, total_profit AS value, 'Best in profit' AS achievement
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY total_profit DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_orders AS (
  SELECT seller_id, distinct_orders AS value, 'Best in distinct orders' AS achievement
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY distinct_orders DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
top_reviews AS (
  SELECT seller_id, five_star_count AS value, 'Best in 5-star ratings' AS achievement
  FROM seller_metrics
  ORDER BY five_star_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers AS value, achievement FROM top_customers
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, value, achievement FROM top_profit
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, value, achievement FROM top_orders
UNION ALL
SELECT seller_id, value, achievement FROM top_reviews;

WITH seller_metrics AS (
    SELECT 
        oi.seller_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_unique_id) AS distinct_customers,
        SUM(oi.price - oi.freight_value) AS total_profit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS distinct_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN orr.review_score = 5 THEN 1 END) AS five_star_count
    FROM olist_orders o
    JOIN olist_order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
    JOIN olist_order_reviews orr ON o.order_id = orr.order_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
    GROUP BY oi.seller_id
),
top_customers AS (
    SELECT seller_id, distinct_customers, 'seller with highest number of distinct customer unique IDs' AS description
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY distinct_customers DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_profit AS (
    SELECT seller_id, total_profit, 'seller with highest profit (price - freight value)' AS description
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY total_profit DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_orders AS (
    SELECT seller_id, distinct_orders, 'seller with highest number of distinct orders' AS description
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY distinct_orders DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
top_five_star AS (
    SELECT seller_id, five_star_count, 'seller with most 5-star ratings' AS description
    FROM seller_metrics
    ORDER BY five_star_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT * FROM top_customers
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM top_profit
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM top_orders
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM top_five_star;
